def positive_partial_update_mutates_input_before_validation_succeeds():
    rule_id = "partial_update_mutates_input_before_validation_succeeds"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag update helpers that mutate caller data before all validation passes."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
